## Meeting Purpose

[Daily standup to discuss Atlas workflow setup and transition from AirOps](https://fathom.video/share/1RzR93z1gtCt-3fZqDMuBegfKoYxaKQn?tab=summary&timestamp=3.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Urgent priority to review and update all artifacts (company context, personas, writing guidelines) in Atlas](https://fathom.video/share/1RzR93z1gtCt-3fZqDMuBegfKoYxaKQn?tab=summary&timestamp=60.0)
  - [Atlas workflows use same backend as AirOps but interface is different; aim to transition ASAP as AirOps access could be cut off any time](https://fathom.video/share/1RzR93z1gtCt-3fZqDMuBegfKoYxaKQn?tab=summary&timestamp=69.0)
  - [Several bugs and issues reported; file Linear tickets and use EBD Slack channel for help](https://fathom.video/share/1RzR93z1gtCt-3fZqDMuBegfKoYxaKQn?tab=summary&timestamp=201.0)
  - [One-on-one sessions available to help set up workflows and address any blockers](https://fathom.video/share/1RzR93z1gtCt-3fZqDMuBegfKoYxaKQn?tab=summary&timestamp=284.0)

## Topics

### Atlas Workflow Setup

  - [Check all artifacts were ported over correctly from AirOps](https://fathom.video/share/1RzR93z1gtCt-3fZqDMuBegfKoYxaKQn?tab=summary&timestamp=103.0)
  - [Company context, user personas, writing guidelines need to be detailed and robust](https://fathom.video/share/1RzR93z1gtCt-3fZqDMuBegfKoYxaKQn?tab=summary&timestamp=140.0)
  - [Can use GitPod artifacts as template if starting from scratch](https://fathom.video/share/1RzR93z1gtCt-3fZqDMuBegfKoYxaKQn?tab=summary&timestamp=383.0)
  - [Aim to have workflows set up to process articles by end of week](https://fathom.video/share/1RzR93z1gtCt-3fZqDMuBegfKoYxaKQn?tab=summary&timestamp=300.0)

### Bugs and Issues

  - [Several bugs reported, including missing outline outputs and incorrect company contexts](https://fathom.video/share/1RzR93z1gtCt-3fZqDMuBegfKoYxaKQn?tab=summary&timestamp=391.0)
  - [File Linear tickets for clear issues, especially if workflows are erroring out](https://fathom.video/share/1RzR93z1gtCt-3fZqDMuBegfKoYxaKQn?tab=summary&timestamp=215.0)
  - [Check Linear and EBD Slack channel for known issues before filing new tickets](https://fathom.video/share/1RzR93z1gtCt-3fZqDMuBegfKoYxaKQn?tab=summary&timestamp=226.0)
  - [Some issues may be due to API rate limits or backend changes during transition](https://fathom.video/share/1RzR93z1gtCt-3fZqDMuBegfKoYxaKQn?tab=summary&timestamp=156.0)

### Resources and Training

  - [Reference AirOps training video for workflow setup principles](https://fathom.video/share/1RzR93z1gtCt-3fZqDMuBegfKoYxaKQn?tab=summary&timestamp=268.0)
  - [Daniel's recent training video useful for understanding Atlas fields](https://fathom.video/share/1RzR93z1gtCt-3fZqDMuBegfKoYxaKQn?tab=summary&timestamp=696.0)
  - [More detailed documentation and Notion manual for Atlas coming soon](https://fathom.video/share/1RzR93z1gtCt-3fZqDMuBegfKoYxaKQn?tab=summary&timestamp=3710.0)

### Team Restructuring

  - [Recent pod changes aimed at mixing competencies (technical SEO, editorial skills)](https://fathom.video/share/1RzR93z1gtCt-3fZqDMuBegfKoYxaKQn?tab=summary&timestamp=2021.0)
  - [Goal is to create stable teams that can support all client needs](https://fathom.video/share/1RzR93z1gtCt-3fZqDMuBegfKoYxaKQn?tab=summary&timestamp=2086.0)
  - [Intended to address gaps in training and reduce client churn](https://fathom.video/share/1RzR93z1gtCt-3fZqDMuBegfKoYxaKQn?tab=summary&timestamp=2142.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Review and update all artifacts in Atlas workflows](https://fathom.video/share/1RzR93z1gtCt-3fZqDMuBegfKoYxaKQn?tab=summary&timestamp=623.0)
  - [Transition article generation to Atlas ASAP; use AirOps only if absolutely necessary](https://fathom.video/share/1RzR93z1gtCt-3fZqDMuBegfKoYxaKQn?tab=summary&timestamp=1908.0)
  - [Attend one-on-one sessions to address workflow setup issues](https://fathom.video/share/1RzR93z1gtCt-3fZqDMuBegfKoYxaKQn?tab=summary&timestamp=287.0)
  - [File Linear tickets for bugs; use EBD Slack channel for help](https://fathom.video/share/1RzR93z1gtCt-3fZqDMuBegfKoYxaKQn?tab=summary&timestamp=201.0)
  - [Watch for upcoming detailed Atlas training and documentation](https://fathom.video/share/1RzR93z1gtCt-3fZqDMuBegfKoYxaKQn?tab=summary&timestamp=3696.0)
